files.src/App.css: :root{color-scheme:dark}*{box-sizing:border-box}html,body,#root{margin:0;min-height:100%;max-width:100%;background:#020617}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden}.main{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;background:#020617;color:#e5e7eb}.card{width:min(100%,980px);min-width:0;display:grid;gap:14px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:16px;background:#0b1020}.header{min-width:0;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.header h1{margin:0;font-size:21px}.subtitle,.selection-summary,.result-summary,.table-status{margin:0;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.subtitle{margin-top:4px;color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;line-height:1.5}.selection-summary,.result-summary{color:#cbd5e1;font-size:13px;font-weight:650}.toolbar{min-width:0;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(220px,1fr) auto auto;align-items:end;gap:12px}.search-field,.page-size-field{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:6px;color:#cbd5e1;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.search-input,.page-size{min-width:0;width:100%;border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:10px;background:#0f172a;color:#f8fafc;padding:9px 11px;font:inherit;font-size:14px}.page-size{width:92px}.search-input:focus-visible,.page-size:focus-visible,button:focus-visible,input[type=checkbox]:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #facc15;outline-offset:2px}.summary-row{min-height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center}.table-scroll{min-width:0;max-width:100%;overflow-x:auto;border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:12px}.table{width:100%;min-width:700px;border-collapse:collapse;background:#020617;font-size:13px}.table caption{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0}.table thead{background:#111827}.table th,.table td{padding:10px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid #1f2937;text-align:left;white-space:nowrap}.table th{color:#cbd5e1;font-size:12px}.table tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0}.data-row:nth-child(even){background:#071022}.data-row:hover{background:#111b31}.select-header,.data-row td:first-child{width:48px;text-align:center}.sort-button{border:0;background:transparent;color:inherit;padding:2px;font:inherit;font-weight:750;cursor:pointer}.user-id{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;color:#a3e635}.user-email{color:#94a3b8}.empty-state td{padding:32px 12px;text-align:center;color:#94a3b8}.footer{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;align-items:center;gap:12px}.footer button,.clear-selection{border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:999px;background:#162033;color:#f8fafc;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}.footer button:hover:not(:disabled),.clear-selection:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:#a3e635}.footer button:disabled,.clear-selection:disabled{cursor:not-allowed;opacity:.45}.page-info{text-align:center;color:#cbd5e1;font-size:13px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.table-status{min-height:20px;color:#bef264;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5}.visually-hidden{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0}@media(max-width:720px){.main{place-items:start center;padding:14px}.card{padding:15px}.header{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.toolbar{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto}.clear-selection{grid-column:1/-1;justify-self:start}}@media(max-width:440px){.toolbar{grid-template-columns:1fr}.page-size{width:100%}.clear-selection{grid-column:auto;width:100%}.footer{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.page-info{grid-column:1/-1;grid-row:1}.previous,.next{grid-row:2}.footer button{width:100%}}
